title: TRADE, TRAVEL AND TOURISM COMMITTEE REPORT relative to waiving the fee charged by the Los Angeles Tourism and Convention Board for restaurants to participate in DineLA.

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Been Held
appearances.recommendation: DIRECT the City Tourism Department to work with the Los Angeles Tourism and Convention Board, to waive the participation fee for restaurants. Fiscal Impact Statement: Neither the City Administrative Officer nor the Chief Legislative Analyst has completed a financial analysis of this report. Community Impact Statement: None submitted. Report from Trade, Travel and Tourism Committee 10-14-25 Motion (Rodriguez - Yaroslavsky) dated 10-07-25

attachments.text: Report from Trade, Travel and Tourism Committee 10-14-25
